mapper.select: select slot_id, slot_name, page_code, resource_type, target_title, sort_no, status, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted from recommend_slots where slot_id = #{slotId} and deleted = false
mapper.update: update recommend_slots set slot_name = #{slotName}, page_code = #{pageCode}, resource_type = #{resourceType}, target_title = #{targetTitle}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, deleted = #{deleted} where slot_id = #{slotId} and deleted = false
